description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on pull requests, pushes to all branches except tags, and published releases. The workflow has four jobs: fedora, build, test, and build-with-python. The fedora job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a fedora:40 container, installing dependencies, linting, configuring with CMake, and building and testing ninja. The build job uses a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-latest and ubuntu-24.04-arm environments with a rockylinux:8 container, building and testing ninja with various configurations. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest and ubuntu-24.04-arm environments with ubuntu:22.04 and ubuntu:24.04 containers, testing ninja with GCC and Clang. The build-with-python job runs on ubuntu-latest and ubuntu-24.04-arm environments with ubuntu:22.04 and ubuntu:24.04 containers, building ninja with Python.
